air_quality.description: Current air quality (PM2.5, PM10, US AQI) for a coordinate.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

current.description: Comma-separated current air-quality variables to return.

latitude.description: Latitude of the matched grid cell.

longitude.description: Longitude of the matched grid cell.

time.description: Timestamps aligned with the value arrays.

pagination.behavior: Returns one current snapshot; no pagination.

air_quality.when_not_to_use: Do not use this operation for weather conditions; use forecast.
air_quality.when_to_use: Use this operation to check current air pollution at a latitude/longitude, e.g. before outdoor plans.

archive.description: Historical daily weather (max/min temperature, precipitation) for a coordinate and date range.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

latitude.description: Latitude of the matched grid cell.

longitude.description: Longitude of the matched grid cell.

precipitation_sum.description: Daily precipitation sum (mm), aligned with time.

temperature_2m_max.description: Daily maximum temperature (°C), aligned with time.

temperature_2m_min.description: Daily minimum temperature (°C), aligned with time.

time.description: Timestamps aligned with the value arrays.

pagination.behavior: Returns one array per requested daily variable covering the date range; no pagination.

archive.when_not_to_use: Do not use this operation for current or future weather; use forecast.
archive.when_to_use: Use this operation for past weather between start_date and end_date (data from 1940 onward, ~5-day delay).

forecast.description: Current conditions and a daily forecast for any coordinates from Open-Meteo's free weather API.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

timezone.description: IANA timezone or 'auto' to infer from the coordinates.

latitude.description: Latitude the forecast grid cell resolves to.

longitude.description: Longitude the forecast grid cell resolves to.

precipitation_sum.description: Daily precipitation total (mm), one entry per forecast day.

temperature_2m_max.description: Daily maximum temperature (°C), one entry per forecast day.

temperature_2m_min.description: Daily minimum temperature (°C), one entry per forecast day.

time.description: Forecast dates (ISO), aligned with the daily arrays.

utc_offset_seconds.description: UTC offset of the reported timezone in seconds.

pagination.behavior: Returns one bounded forecast per call; no pagination.

forecast.when_not_to_use: Do not use this operation for historical weather, marine/air-quality data, or minute-level nowcasts; those Open-Meteo endpoints are not mapped.
forecast.when_to_use: Use this operation to get live weather and the multi-day outlook for a latitude/longitude (get coordinates from the geocode operation first).

geocode.description: Resolve a place name to coordinates using Open-Meteo's geocoding API.

errors.message: One or more operation inputs are missing or invalid.
errors.user_action: Correct the named input using the operation schema and retry.

errors.message: The requested public resource does not exist or is unavailable.
errors.user_action: Check the resource identifier with a discovery operation before retrying.

errors.message: The website is temporarily rate limiting this operation.
errors.user_action: Wait for the reported retry interval before calling the operation again.

errors.message: The website is temporarily unavailable or returned an invalid response.
errors.user_action: Retry once, then check the website's service status if the error continues.

count.description: Maximum number of matches to return.

items.description: Places matching the query, best match first.

admin1_id.description: GeoNames id of the first-level admin area.

pagination.behavior: Returns up to count matches in one response; no pagination.

geocode.when_not_to_use: Do not use this operation for street-level addresses or reverse geocoding; use nominatim for those.
geocode.when_to_use: Use this operation to turn a city or place name into latitude/longitude before calling forecast.

constraints: Site permissions, rate limits, and anti-automation rules still apply
human_boundaries: Open-Meteo is fully public for non-commercial use; no authenticated surfaces exist to map.
coverage.website_parity: Mapping mode can inspect the remaining website while direct request recipes are compiled. Browser commands are never counted as runtime parity.

description: Open-Meteo weather: forecasts, historical archives, air quality, and place geocoding worldwide, no API key.
